item.title:
We pulled someone from our DMs and didn't tell them they were racing an F1 driver.
It went exactly ...
item.description:
We pulled someone from our DMs and didn't tell them they were racing an F1 driver.
It went exactly how you'd think. https://t.co/e1gXxtCDSw
--- @coinbase | ❤️ 74 | 🔁 6 | 💬 26 | 👁 11931
